prose: Frontier orbital calculations were performed on furan using Density Functional Theory (DFT) at the B3LYP functional with the def2-TZVP basis set (designated as tier 'standard') in the gas phase. The HOMO–LUMO gap was determined to be 6.25736 eV. The calculation was executed using PySCF, with SCF convergence achieved in 9 cycles. No warnings were reported by the engine, indicating a clean result. The geometry for the calculation was taken from the file `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz`. Full checkpoint files are available on request.
